name: Mike's Linguini with Clams
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons Best olive oil you can buy.
recipeInstructions:
1. Get the water salted and boiling for the linguini. Put the parsley into a container with an equal amount of water to get it looking like reconstituted parsley.
2. Heat olive oil in a saucepan over medium heat. Press garlic into the oil, stirring occasionally until the garlic just starts to bubble. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 2 minutes or so. Do not let the garlic turn brown. Once the pasta is done, drain it.
3. Add the drained linguini to the pan with garlic oil. Stir in the parsley and freshly ground black pepper until well combined. Bring mixture back to serving temperature.
4. Gently add the drained clams, stirring to combine. Mix well and serve. Adjust garlic and pepper to taste.
